query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A pigeon in mid-flight captured in black and white, wings fully extended, against a dark indistinct background with a lighter area at upper left suggesting sky or distant illumination.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A pigeon in mid-flight rendered with heavy motion blur that streaks wings and background into sweeping gestural trails, the black and white palette crushed into oppressive low-contrast gloom where forms dissolve into abstraction, creating an atmosphere of anxious unease rather than documentary clarity.
